items.title: I Fly the World-First VTuber Airplane 【 hololive "ita-plane" 】
items.author: hwikky
items.content:
<article>🍹 hololive production Cheer UP Pop-up Cafe is now OPEN! 🍰
- From October 18th to December 06th
- At ARCANE CAFE in LA (171 Live Oak Ave Suite D, Arcadia, CA 91006)
- hololive-themed space inside the Cafe
- Exclusive merch, food, drinks, and giveaways
✨ More details here: https://arcanecafe.com/hololive/
